title: scutellaria seleriana
intro: Scutellaria seleriana, also known as Mexican skullcap, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria seleriana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain and anxiety, and improving sleep quality. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in capsules or dried form for use in herbal remedies.
